description: You are a 5th-grade science teacher at an OLPC-equipped school preparing an offline reading unit. The Sugar desktop is showing the home view. Create an illustrated fact sheet about the Capybara. Download the image from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/3/34/Capybara_grazing.jpg and resize it to a width of exactly 500 pixels (maintaining aspect ratio), saving it as /home/ga/Documents/capybara_500px.jpg. Fetch the introductory summary text of the 'Capybara' article from English Wikipedia. Produce a Sugar Write document titled 'Animal Fact Sheet: Capybara' containing the Wikipedia summary and the resized image. Save the final document to /home/ga/Documents/capybara_factsheet.odt.
